goal: fs_union[T](fs_intersection[T](s, t), fs_difference[T](s, t)).underlying_set = fs_intersection[T](s, t).underlying_set.union(fs_difference[T](s, t).underlying_set)
proof: function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: FiniteSet[T0]) { FiniteSet.new[T0](x0.underlying_set ∪ x1.underlying_set) = Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](fs_union[T0](x0, x1)) }[T](fs_intersection[T](s, t), fs_difference[T](s, t))
